posts.title: The Fiery History of Salsa Macha
posts.excerpt: Discover the roots of Mexico's crunchiest, smokiest condiment.
posts.content: Salsa macha originated in Veracruz. Unlike traditional salsas, it uses absolutely no water, relying instead on high-quality oils to preserve the deeply toasted chiles, nuts, and seeds...

posts.title: 5 Ways to Eat Salsa Macha (Besides Tacos)
posts.excerpt: Put it on eggs, pizza, and even ice cream.
posts.content: You already know it goes on tacos. But have you tried drizzling it over a hot slice of pizza? Or mixing it into your morning scrambled eggs? Here are five unexpected ways to use our signature macha...

process.title: MADE FROM
process.desc: Slow-fried chiles, seeds, and nuts. No preservatives.

original.name: ORIGINAL MACHA
original.desc: The Chiapas classic. Fried chiles, garlic, seeds. Pure crunch.

chipotle.name: SMOKY CHIPOTLE
chipotle.desc: Deep smoke, slight sweetness. The taco perfector.

habanero.name: FUEGO HABANERO
habanero.desc: Intense heat. Fruity notes. Not for the timid.

story.p1: Born in Chiapas. Refined in Koprivnica.
story.p2: Traditional techniques meets local premium oils.

items.a: We have levels! Original is a slow burn, Habanero is for the fire-breathers.
Stays fresh for up to 6 months. Keep the jar closed!
100%. No bees, no dairy, just plants and fire.

habanero.desc: Intenzivna vrućina. Voćne note. Nije za one slabog srca.

story.p1: Izvorno iz Chiapas. Usavršeno u Koprivnici.
story.p2: Tradicionalne tehnike susreću vrhunska lokalna ulja.

items.a: Imamo razine! Original je blag, Habanero je za one koji dišu vatru.
Ostaje svježe do 6 mjeseci. Držite staklenku zatvorenom!
100%. Nema pčela, nema mliječnih proizvoda, samo biljke i vatra.
